name: Generate Random Number within Range
short_description: Generates a uniformly distributed random floating-point number between a specified lower and upper bound, rounded to two decimal places. This function is typically used as a utility for generating random inputs in financial models or simulations.

inputs.name: low
inputs.description: The lower bound (inclusive) for the generated random number.

inputs.name: high
inputs.description: The upper bound (inclusive) for the generated random number.

name: Crypto Tax Penalty Calculation
short_description: Calculates the tax penalty imposed on a crypto exchange due to non-compliance, based on its transaction volume and a specified penalty rate.

inputs.name: transaction_volume
inputs.description: Total transaction volume processed by the crypto exchange in USD.

inputs.name: penalty_rate
inputs.description: The penalty rate imposed due to non-compliance, expressed as a percentage (e.g., 5 for 5%).

name: Crypto Compliance Fee Adjustment
short_description: Calculates an adjusted crypto compliance fee based on a base fee and an adjustment factor.

inputs.name: base_fee
inputs.description: The initial compliance fee before adjustment.

inputs.name: adjustment_factor
inputs.description: The factor by which the base fee is adjusted due to new regulations.

name: Regulatory Impact on Listing Fee
short_description: Intermediate: Regulatory impact on listing fee.

inputs.name: current_fee
inputs.description: The current listing fee in USD.

inputs.name: impact_percentage
inputs.description: The percentage increase in the fee due to regulations.

name: Regulatory-imposed trade cost adjustment
short_description: Intermediate: Regulatory-imposed trade cost adjustment for crypto trade costs.

inputs.name: original_cost
inputs.description: Original trade cost per transaction in USD.

inputs.name: regulation_multiplier
inputs.description: Multiplier applied due to enhanced regulatory requirements.

name: Multi-Factor Regulatory Compliance Cost
short_description: Advanced: Multi-factor regulatory compliance cost evaluation for a crypto firm, summing various regulatory cost factors.

inputs.name: baseline_cost
inputs.description: The baseline compliance cost of the firm.

inputs.name: factor_a
inputs.description: Additional cost factor from audit frequency (as a decimal).

inputs.name: factor_b
inputs.description: Additional cost factor from regulatory fines (as a decimal).

inputs.name: factor_c
inputs.description: Additional cost factor from compliance surcharge (as a decimal).
